title: 45-lesson milestone
text: 45 lessons! You can write real stories, ask questions, count numbers, and share your feelings. Five lessons left until you become a certified little typist. Stay calm, type with care!

tips.target: 45 lessons! You can write real stories, ask questions, count numbers, and share your feelings.
Five lessons left until you become a certified little typist. Stay calm, type with care!

character_tips.anna: 🎯 45 in! Five to the certificate. Stay calm.
character_tips.maxim: 45 lessons. Five to finale. Hold the gain.
character_tips.klavochka: Five steps to your special crown, my hero 👑
